name: J.B. Smoove
bio: J.B. Smoove, born Jerry Brooks, is an American stand-up comedian, actor and writer. He began on Def Comedy Jam in 1995 and was a writer and performer on Saturday Night Live from 2003 to 2006. He is best known for playing Leon Black on HBOs Curb Your Enthusiasm.

timeline.ev: Joined Saturday Night Live as writer
Began playing Leon Black on Curb Your Enthusiasm

accolades: 2007 Writers Guild of America Award (SNL, Best Comedy/Variety Series)

specials.t: JB Smoove: Thats How I Dooz It
